notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Mariners challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Bryan Woo picks off Oswald Peraza at 1st on throw to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Victor Robles batting, J.P. Crawford picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Oswald Peraza.

notableEvents.label: Luke Raley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley lines out to shortstop Zach Neto.
